entry.title: Backlog Expedition v1.2.1
entry.content:
## New in this version - Added support for drawing a random selection of backlog games - Changed the way backlog games are added, to be more streamlined - Added better descriptions to options - Added error handling, that will now issue warnings when numbers are off during generation
## Notes about this version - Compatible with v.2.0.0 of the game
## Learn more about this AP-world - [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md) - [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.5
entry.content:
## Added - Death link option
## Bug Fix - Monkey village pop-tier checks no longer generate

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.2
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Support for both the New (Feb 2026) BO3 client and the Old BO3 client, thanks to @Scroptss for helping update the offsets - Separate downloads - Moon: - Fix Space Dog toy checks having the wrong name @eah1759 - Fix Electric Cherry incorrectly awarding Widow's Wine - Fix PhD Flopper being available on Shadows of Evil via random perk powerup - Fix Moon round saving not working - Restructure round end saving to not risk conflicting with checkpointing

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.1.0.post2
entry.content:
Changes: - Complete port to rules builder. - This *should* allow /explain and the like in Universal Tracker to work. - Some rules are still a bit archaic (some option oriented things), can be cleaned up later.
Bugfixes: - Fixed rules for some experience quests, which were missing some potential rules. - Removed Pot 2 from Tengoku Gardens so it cannot be missed - This is temporary; the check has not been sending and needs to be properly fixed but I'm a bit spread thin.

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.1.1
entry.content: Bugfixes: - Fix logic bug for pathing into sewers without double jump. - Fix logic mismatch with pots at JG: First Drop. - Fix rule for Slime Form Room Chest 1 actually being on Chest 3.

entry.title: Crash2 v0.3.0
entry.content:
Big update, here's everything new since v0.2.0
### Warp Randomizer: - Option to randomize the warp room portals to lead to different levels - Collected gem/crystal locations will show up in their vanilla location - Secret warp room portals are not currently randomized due to some bugs - Supports Universal Tracker
### Traps: - Customizable chance to replace filler life/wumpa items with traps with a customizable duration - Small Crash Trap & Big Crash Trap - Scales Crash's size accordingly - Small Crash is disabled in levels that feature Polar due to a buggy interaction - No Lives Trap - Temporarily lose all your lives - Jetpack Controls - 😵
### Options: - New Option to fill wumpa checks locally - This is to prevent other worlds from getting clogged with Crash 2 filler when playing fruitsanity - New Option to exclude difficult wumpa checks - This will prevent wumpas in difficult/annoying spots from containing useful items (affected locations have a "*" in their name) - Updated some option descriptions to be more detailed and added option groups
### Other Additions: - When playing fruitsanity, wumpa fruit are now collected permanently - This is true even after restarting / reconnecting the client - Added the two wumpas from Cold Hard Crash that I previously thought were unobtainable as actual checks
### Bug Fixes: - Letting the demo run will no longer collect wumpa fruit checks
### Known Issues: - When using warp randomizer, exiting Totally Fly always puts you in the 4th warp room, which can give access to the 4th warp room early - Also use [GitHub issues](https://github.com/Sim10XXX/C2AP/issues) or the [Crash 2 AP thread](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1371461990794657863) to report bugs or suggest stuff

entry.title: Golden Sun The Lost Age v0.2.3b0
entry.content:
Game description is [here](https://github.com/cjmang/Archipelago/blob/gstla/worlds/gstla/docs/en_Golden%20Sun%20The%20Lost%20Age.md). (Don't expect the link to the options page to work.)
Game setup guide is [here](https://github.com/cjmang/Archipelago/blob/gstla/worlds/gstla/docs/setup_en.md).
To install the AP World, use the Archipelago Launcher's Install APWorld button, or just copy and paste gstla.apworld into your custom_worlds folder. Once the apworld is installed you can find a yaml after running Generate Template Options in the AP Launcher, or by using the Options Creator.
In general this AP World implementation relies heavily on the existing randomizer, which you can find here: https://gs2randomiser.com/en/index.html
Please reach out in the [GSTLA Post in Future Game Design on the AP discord if you find issues.](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1055515261270241320).
Changes in this release: - Moved sphere scaling from `generate_output` to `stage_finalize_multiworld`. This does two things: (1) no more race conditions (2) sphere calculations are done once for all GSTLA slots. - Fixed an issue with mimic scaling that didn't properly place items. - Fixed a typo with Taopo
Note: Archipelago version 0.6.7+ is required. It will not work on 0.6.6 or earlier versions.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.3.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.3
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.6.0
entry.content:
Added bomb fragment MacGuffin goal and removed Networth only goal New goals: bomb_fragments_only: 0 missions_only: 0 missions_networth: 50 missions_bomb_fragments: 0 missions_networth_bomb_fragments: 0 bomb_fragments_networth: 0
Added deathlink options: Specify how deathlink will affect you. traps include: Heat Trap, Slippery Trap, Trash Trap, Pan Trap, TimeScale Trap, Sleep Trap Death sends players to the hospital (Cash Fee). Recommended: Use either random trap or death or both. Sleep trap is okay too. Arrested is especially brutal.
Options: - sleep trap: Ends day. - arrested: Player is arrested and loses all illegal items in their inventory. - random trap: Player will be affected by a random trap. - death: Player will be sent to the hospital upon death (Cash Fee). The mod does not reset to last save on death.
Note: Compatible with mod version 1.5.0

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.8
entry.content: Added sprite editor

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.9
entry.content: Added support for the 3 other palettes

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.2
entry.content: - Fix clientfield mismatch for Shadows of Evil

entry.title: Trackmania v1.3.2
entry.content: # Changes - Added filter option for a track being a Track of the Day (Thank you BREZ!)

entry.title: Final Fantasy Mystic Quest v1.7b5
entry.content: - No longer relies on an external API for map shuffle, overworld shuffle, crest shuffle, battlefield shuffle, etc., all of these are handled by Archipelago itself. - No longer stores map shuffle data in slot data. Universal Tracker support is achieved by storing relevant yaml options and a set random seed. - Fixes an issue with the Doom Castle Access option.

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.6
entry.content: ## Changes - Added Blacklist and whitelist to force maps in/out the generation - Updated yaml to be cleaner

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.10
entry.content: Added compatibility to more sprite editors

entry.title: Brave Fencer Musashi v0.5.0
entry.content:
Added: -Open World options -quest item sanity -bizhawk client commands -additional map for Universal Tracker https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases/tag/Tracker_v0.2.28
Note: -Not compatible with XDelta Patches, must run unmodified game -not compatible with prior apworld generations -setup guide:https://github.com/AegeusEvander/Brave-Fencer-Musashi-AP-World/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md -Follow development and report bugs on the Archipelago gg Discord, -> Future-game-design -> Brave Fencer Musashi

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.3
entry.content:
# Path of Exile apworld 1.3.3 -- The one with QoL
## Patch notes: - Moving away from poptracker. - Made a new icon - Migrated tracker to GitHub Pages under https://stubobis1.github.io/pathofexile_ap/, (URL subject to change) enabling static hosting. - Should be mobile friendly! - Items page; - This page contains all of your unlocked gems, classes, passive points, and other items. - Interactive gem tooltips like the wiki are working (\^.\^) - Locations page; - Shows you what acts items first show up at, and which base items are locations in the multiworld - Hints page; - Shows your hints. - Equipment page; - This page contains information about what you can equip - links, rarity and types of weapons. - Added flask slots to the equipment page, expanding the gear grid with 5 new slots positioned below the belt/boots row - Flask system supports Normal, Magic, and Unique tiers (Rare excluded), with progression-based unlock logic and fallback checks for each tier ( this should mirror the python logic for unlocking flasks) - Flask slots now dynamically stretch across the equipment row using a flex layout for consistent spacing - Implemented tooltip caching for instant repeat hovers (and to not overload the poewiki servers) and improved positioning logic to prevent screen overflow - Yoinked assets from poptracker - Introduced a dedicated Setup & Guide page (https://stubobis1.github.io/pathofexile_ap/guide.html) this should be a nice looking introduction to setting this up - Added full Fontin font family support (Regular, Bold, Italic, SmallCaps) across tracker and guide pages - Remade the oauth sucess / failure pages. - Should also now redirect you to the tracker, with the slot data so you don't have to enter it in twice. - Created an options page, so manual editing of YAMLs is not needed as much (https://stubobis1.github.io/pathofexile_ap/options.html) - boss options hide if you aren't doing a boss run.
## Bug fixes: - Fixed a multiworld generation crash because of generating output. - Fixed an issue with random rarity flasks (someone please yell at me if your flasks aren't working right) - Fixed Offhands having 4 links, the maximum is 3. ## NOTES: - Tracker assets have been fully decoupled from worlds/poe/poeClient/static/ and are now hosted via GitHub Pages - Game data (_DATA_BASE) continues to load from remote GitHub raw URLs — no local JSON dependency required - CSS has been extracted from the tracker index.html into a reusable tracker.css file for improved maintainability - Guide page includes advanced tips, troubleshooting (e.g., OneDrive filtering issues), and command references ## As with any release of this scope, additional edge cases may exist—report any issues you encounter This release may have some other gotchas with the websites, I'm real tired and haven't tested all of the edgecases. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.3.2...1.3.3
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/K3K41PE6IX)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.11
entry.content: Fixed compatibility with 32 bits bmps

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.0.post2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.0 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
With the change of the game's development to Steam instead, development on the Itch.io version has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Support for the new Steam version of Casualties: Unknown (V6) - New V6 Moodles are included in Moodlesanity, and the new recipe is included in Craftsanity [APWorld Change] # Changes - Slightly changed the popup of the Reverse Controls Trap to better fit the new way reversed controls works - Update to BepInEx v5.4.23.5 / latest v5 version # Fixes - If the first Archipelago item encountered in a session is inside a Survivor inventory, it will no longer have the incorrect description - Liquids that don't have an item counterpart will no longer throw an error when obtained through Free Samples # Known Issues - Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.12
entry.content: Added the ability to select which game to select the sprite for

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.2
entry.content: ### Woohoo! Just what I needed! ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.2) * Probably not compatible with ongoing games ## Changes * Implemented DeathLink * Stars can nullify one death signal at a time * Hearts can also nullify one death signal if desired * DeathLink, EnergyLink and TrapLink can now be toggled in the Manager at any time * Potentially fixes Yoshi House's goal forcing a ton of eggs being panic swap targeted * Fixes alternate logic being all messed up in Universal Tracker * Fixes some unusual cases where exits will be reported as reachable out of logic in UT * Fixes boos hurting Mario while ducking or when having an active star and riding Yoshi * Fixes locations other than exits having wrong classifications on levels with swapped exits * Run no longer displays an A in the in-game tracker * Goal location is now an event * Removed `swap_level_exits` option, it stopped mattering a long time ago * Alternate Logic no longer has every setting on by default * Enemy Shuffle updates: * FoI4 now guarantees a bouncing koopa after the midway point * VoB2 no longer has Dino Rhinos on the first room * VoB2 no longer has bouncing american footballs in the third room * DS1 now has fishes after exiting the secondary room * Several logic updates I forgot to document

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.7
entry.content: - Fixed trap weights not working in options creator

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.1
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.1 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Updated custom title screen logo that follows the new V6 logo design - Custom language support now supports all UI # Changes - Archipelago Trap moodles now show a dynamic timer to when they will end - The Deadly Moodlesanity preset now contains Severe and Critical hypoxemia, Ventricular fibrillation, Palpitations, Circulatory collapse, Severe hypotension, Hypertensive crisis, Severe hypertension, and Toxic crisis [APWorld Change] - The Difficult Moodlesanity preset now contains Palpitations and Critical hypoxemia [APWorld Change] # Fixes - Fixed `Moodlesanity - Internal bleeding` not sending # Known Issues - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.4
entry.content:
## Major bugfix
There was an issue where the response page for oauth was not rendering when zipping up into a `.apworld` "It worked on my machine!
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.3.3...1.3.4

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.4
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.4
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.3
entry.content: Woohoo! 👀 ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.3) ## Changes * Fixed a broken rule * Updated Manager window with the correct name

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v70
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges)

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.0.post2
entry.content:
Origins is in a playable state, and has the vast majority of checks and save systems added to it. It's being marked as unstable until there's been more testing, polishing, and the rest of the checks are added. This means that existing checks may change in a future release.
**Reminder**: Download the correct mod file for your version of the game.
- **(New)** (Unstable) Origins Support: - Save System - See SAVE_SYSTEM.md in the repo - Checks: - 1, 3 and 6 Generators turned on - 1 and 4 Soul Boxes filled - Gramophone Player Part - Gramophone Blank Disc Part - 4 Elemental Disc Parts - 3 Shield Parts - 3 Maxis Drone Parts - 4 Checks per Staff (16 total) - Craft Staff - Puzzle 1 Complete - Puzzle 2 Complete - Upgraded Staff Charged - 6 Main Easter Egg Steps - 3 Music Easter Eggs - Staff Upgrade Checks (default on) - Enable checks when using Goal Round victory condition (always enabled in other modes) - New Checks: - Total Kill and Headshot checks per-map based on maximum rounds in logic: - Kills default on, Headshots default off - 8 Rounds - 75 K, 25 H - 12 Rounds - 150 K, 75 H - 16 Rounds - 300 K, 125 H - 22 Rounds - 500 K, 250 H - 30 Rounds - 1000 K, 400 H - Player statistics are now saved per-map, instead of per-seed. They are still kept after a game over. - Remove certain perk unlocks on maps without a wunderfizz or that use mechanics which bypass perk locks - This will likely come back in the form of new machine placements set by yaml in a later release - Fix Shadows of Evil being enabled if only Moon was set in the yaml

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Origins is now available on the Checks tab - Checks tab now only shows checks which are enabled on the seed - Fix extra check notifications showing for collected checks which weren't collected on your client, or were collected before a crash - Fix Origins Elemental Discs not being taken away properly after pickup

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Apworld bugfix only.
- Fix Gorod dragon wings check only being added when starting dragon wings is enabled - Fix lambda capture issue with kill / headshot logic rules

entry.title: Voltorb Flip v1.1.1
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Declared the Luck item as filler if artificial logic is turned off - Fixed incomplete manifest file
# Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots? Yes, back to 1.0.0

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.2 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Support Casualties: Unknown V6.1 # Fixes - Elder Thornback Trap now properly times the Moodle change like before - Elder Thornback Trap now restores mood after the trap ends - Fixed Foliage, Water, and Climbing rope recipes expecting the wrong INT level to craft [APWorld Change] # Known Issues - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.1...v0.9.2

entry.title: Refunct v1.0.2a0
entry.content: ## Version 1.0.2a - Mod update only, apworld&yaml are the same. - Fixed version mismatch issue. - Fixed game bug where all platforms are up after resetting at a specific. - Worked on the start-up crash, fixed now? (if not please send over the log right after it crashed! :D `Users\user\AppData\Local\Temp\refunct-tas.log`)

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v72
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges)

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v73
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found`

entry.title: Corn Kidz 64 v0.0.6
entry.content:
- Added Ally Picture Check - **Multiple Goals** can now be selected - Note: the option was also renamed from `goal` to `goal_selection` - Added new option **Switchsanity** - This adds the 4 Switches for the door to Dog God in Some Other Place to item/location pool - Added new option **Test Cubesanity** - This adds the 25 Test Cube from the Test Zone to item/location pool - Div. logic fixes: - Fixed zoo rat 2 requirements - Fixed VoidScrewHollowSky missing Slam requirement - Fixed MirrorHollowZooSideCrank requirement - Fixed CubeParkSlide requirement - Fixed MonsterParkHouseFoyer access requirements - Fix some UT issues - Added archipelago.json - Switched to Rule Builder
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.0
entry.content: - Added Upgrade Sanity Option - Logic for pop tier checks behind locked upgrades added

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Origins: - Exit teleporters are now restored - QoL: After all staffs are placed, all 3 giants will have a hatch until the g-strike hole is blown open - Player Save Additions: - Has Shovel / Golden Shovel / Golden Helmet - Number of spots dug - Streak of bad dig rewards (3 losses means next dig spot is 100% a win) - **Note:** Zombie Blood Dig Spots with Golden Shovel will currently not be restored - Locked wallbuys now show a neon red padlock symbol over them

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16908543
entry.content:
### Requires Archipelago 0.6.7! #### This is a prerelease which means that bugs have probably made a home in this build!
Hot Dog! Another big update!
See more information about this mod (bugs, workarounds, configs, etc) in the [Cuphead channel](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1497318235438186566) in the Archipelago Discord.
*Note: Some YAML settings have changed format, check your yaml!*
WARNING: This is in alpha, just be aware that bugs do live in things that are in alpha!
**NOTE: This is not compatible with any apworld version older than alpha03 including prelease versions of alpha03!**
### What's new in alpha03?
- Rewritten logic! - Better Logic! - Chalice logic with double jump is implemented! - Partial hard logic (it works, but only a handful of stuffs has harder logic. More to come!) - Yet Another Project Restructure with cleaner logic code and better maintainability. (geek stuffs) - Universal tracker support! - Support for not starting with a weapon. - Lots of Logic and APWorld bugs fixed! - Even more!
Have fun, and take care!

new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found`

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.4
entry.content: Something(tm) broke, not what I needed (to see). # Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.4) # Changes * Potentially fixed "Out of Logic" level clears in Universal Tracker * Please use `"default"` setting for deferred entrances in Universal Tracker! * Fixed fireballs not bouncing on the ground * Fixed FoI4 secret exit access rule

entry.title: Metroid Zero Mission v0.5.3
entry.content: Quick item sprite hotfix: * Added item sprites for Samus Returns * Added item sprites for progression variants of Map Rando missile/super/power bomb tanks * Fixed Wall Jump being orange instead of the intended white

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.3
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.3 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Universal Tracker support! Moodlesanity Questboard will no longer show incorrect moodles inside of UT [APWorld Change] # Changes - Archipelago Item descriptions now show an item's classification color - The "Moodlesanity Questboard Cooldown Time" YAML option can now be disabled entierly [APWorld Change] - The "Moodlesanity Exclusions" presets now must be in uppercase. This might break some pre-existing YAMLs! [APWorld Change] # Fixes - Fixed a missing space in the minigame locked popups - Actually fixed `Moodlesanity - Internal bleeding` this time - Optomised Archipelago Items code to cause less lag on lower end devices - Fixed the game mod thinking there was one more Archipelago Item than was set in the YAML, causing an empty item to spawn - Fixed Archipelago Items retaining their name and description after running out of locations instead of reverting to INT Experience Bundle items - Fixed Archipelago Items turning themselves back on after returning to the main menu # Known Issues - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.2...v0.9.3

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.4
entry.content:
This version of the mod is also compatible with lower 0.5 releases.
Reminder that Moon and Origins do not currently have Easter Egg Checkpoints. You must use round or token checkpoints.
**Apworld:** - New Option - Start with Super EE Reward - Starting RK5 - *Starting Pistol Max Ammo is not implemented yet* - Decreased number of rounds in logic given by weapon unlocks by 33% - Added 3 perk requirement to logically access round 18 on maps with more than 5 perks
**Mod:** - Prevent Mystery Box being spun and giving a random map weapon when no more unlocked weapons are available - *This behaviour does not work on Origins* - Solo Quick Revive no longer turns off after 3 uses - Remove perk weighting for Wunderfizz on Der Eisendrache, Gorod Krovi, Revelations and Origins - Der Eisendrache - Dr Groph should no longer have repeating story or round based voiceover during late game restoration - Zetsubou No Shima - If not brought in gobblegum pack, Anywhere But Here is added to an invisible 6th slot instead of overwriting the 5th slot - Archipelago Shop added to Moon and Origins
**Known Issues:** - Shop Token count can show incorrectly on the client. You can still purchase the item if you have a token, even if the shop visually says otherwise. - Weapons restore with max ammo.
